title: Inventory Renderer Modules
summary: Current-state inventory of source-only metadata for the fourteen committed src/render/ TypeScript modules that model the vanilla DOOM software renderer surface: viewport/projection/lighting constants, BSP-clip pool/sentinel limits, low-level column and span draw primitives, fuzz invisibility, wall-texture composite column fetch, solid and two-sided wall rendering, masked midtextures, sky cylinder rendering, visplane allocation/merge and span flushing, sprite projection/sort/clip, and patch-format decode/draw, without embedding proprietary WAD bytes.
evidence_method: inventory lane local repository audit using git ls-files-compatible Bun.Glob scans, sha256sum-equivalent SHA-256 fingerprints, src/render/, test/render/, reference/manifests/vanilla-limit-summary.json, reference/manifests/source-catalog.json Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 anchors, and package.json Bun script context.

modules.role: Implements the low-level R_DrawColumn vertical column drawer and R_DrawSpan horizontal span drawer that every wall, sky, sprite, floor, and ceiling pass routes pixel writes through, masked column reads modulo 128 and 64x64 flat indexing through the light-diminish colormap.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 r_draw.c R_DrawColumn and R_DrawSpan inner-loop column/span pixel write behavior with the COLUMN_HEIGHT_MASK=127 and FLAT_Y_SHIFT=10/FLAT_Y_MASK=4032 vanilla composition constants.

modules.role: Implements R_DrawFuzzColumn deterministic 50-entry +/-1 row offset table, the persistent fuzzpos counter, and the FUZZ_COLORMAP_INDEX=6 mid-brightness ramp routing for partial-invisibility Spectre and Blur-Sphere sprite columns.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 r_draw.c R_DrawFuzzColumn fuzzoffset[FUZZTABLE]=50 ramp and the MF_SHADOW-triggered colormap=NULL fuzz-routing branch in r_things.c R_ProjectSprite.

modules.role: Implements R_RenderMaskedSegRange masked-midtexture pass that reads per-column raw texturecolumn values from a two-sided drawseg and routes them through the patch column decoder onto the deferred sprite-clip mceilingclip/mfloorclip arrays, marking each consumed column with the MAXSHORT done sentinel.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 r_segs.c R_RenderMaskedSegRange and r_things.c R_DrawMaskedColumn deferred two-sided midtexture column draw behavior with the maskedtexturecol[x]=MAXSHORT done-flag write.

modules.role: Decodes the column-packed DOOM patch lump format (16-bit width/height/leftOffset/topOffset header, 32-bit columnOffsets table, post-chain bodies with topDelta/length/padding bytes) and exposes V_DrawPatch palette-indexed framebuffer blitting for HUD graphics, sprites, fonts, and menu art.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 v_video.c V_DrawPatch and r_data.c R_GetColumn patch-lump format decode, post-chain walk, and 8-bit palette-indexed framebuffer blit behavior.

modules.role: Defines the renderer's compile-time constants (FIELDOFVIEW=2048, NUMCOLORMAPS=32, LIGHTLEVELS=16, MAXSEGS, MAXVISPLANES, MAXOPENINGS, MAX_SETBLOCKS=11, MIN_SETBLOCKS=3, SBARHEIGHT=32) and the computeViewport derivation that mirrors R_ExecuteSetViewSize centerx/centery/centerxfrac/centeryfrac/projection/viewwindowx/viewwindowy outputs from setblocks and detailshift inputs.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 r_main.c R_ExecuteSetViewSize and R_InitTextureMapping projection constants, viewport setup, and lighting-table dimensioning behavior.

modules.role: Defines the renderer pool/limit constants (MAXDRAWSEGS=256, OPENINGS_POOL_BYTES, the BSP-clip CLIPRANGE_SENTINEL_FIRST_LOW/LAST_LOW/LAST_HIGH guard values, and the VISPLANE_TOP_UNFILLED=0xff column-untouched marker) shared by the visplane builder, openings allocator, drawseg recorder, and solidsegs clip walker, plus the Silhouette enum and Drawseg/ClipRange/Visplane interface shapes.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 r_bsp.c MAXSEGS solidsegs cap, r_bsp.c MAXDRAWSEGS drawseg list cap, r_plane.c MAXVISPLANES/MAXOPENINGS pool caps, r_defs.h Silhouette flags, and r_plane.c memset(check->top, 0xff) visplane unfilled marker behavior.

modules.role: Implements the sky branch of R_DrawPlanes and R_InitSkyMap sky-cylinder semantics: F_SKY1 picnum match, ANGLETOSKYSHIFT=22 BAM-to-1024-column sky angle conversion, sky-visplane collapse to height=0/lightlevel=0, sky iscale derivation, and pspriteIscale player-weapon scale derivation, routing each sky column through rDrawColumn with the SKY_COLORMAP_INDEX=0 fixed colormap.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 r_plane.c sky branch of R_DrawPlanes, r_sky.c R_InitSkyMap ANGLETOSKYSHIFT and SKYFLATNAME constants, and the cylinder-wrap virtual-1024-column sky rendering behavior.

modules.role: Implements the one-sided solid-wall midtexture path of R_RenderSegLoop: per-column yl/yh derivation from topfrac/bottomfrac clamped to ceilingClip/floorClip, ceiling/floor visplane marking, light-diminish wallLights[scale>>LIGHTSCALESHIFT] selection, dc_iscale=0xffffffff/scale unsigned-int32 division, midtexture column fetch, and the terminal ceilingClip[x]=viewHeight/floorClip[x]=-1 column close-off write.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 r_segs.c R_StoreWallRange and R_RenderSegLoop midtexture branch one-sided solid-wall column draw and ceilingclip/floorclip terminal-write behavior.

modules.role: Implements the back-to-front sprite sort, the per-sprite drawseg silhouette walk (R_DrawSprite) that overlays sprtopclip/sprbottomclip onto mceilingclip/mfloorclip scratch arrays, the R_DrawMasked orchestrator that interleaves sprite draws with deferred masked midtexture renders, and the R_PointOnSegSide BSP front/back classifier used by drawseg ordering.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 r_things.c R_SortVisSprites, R_DrawSprite, R_DrawMasked sprite/drawseg interleaving plus r_main.c R_PointOnSegSide BSP front/back classification behavior.

modules.role: Implements R_ProjectSprite per-mobj six-step rejection cascade (near-clip MINZ=4*FRACUNIT, off-screen, sprite-frame lookup, 8-rotation pick, viewport clip, MAXVISSPRITES=128 pool overflow), R_NewVisSprite pool allocation, and R_ClearSprites per-frame pool reset using the FF_FRAMEMASK and FF_FULLBRIGHT sprite-flag bits.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 r_things.c R_ProjectSprite, R_NewVisSprite, R_ClearSprites, MINZ near-clip, MAXVISSPRITES pool, and FF_FRAMEMASK/FF_FULLBRIGHT sprite flag behavior.

modules.role: Implements the pass-through two-sided wall path of R_RenderSegLoop: per-column yl/yh derivation, ceiling/floor visplane marking, upper texture (above the opening) and lower texture (below the opening) draws with pixHigh/pixLow accumulators, light-diminish colormap selection, and the per-column ceilingClip/floorClip updates that allow sprites and back-sector visplanes to draw through the gap.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 r_segs.c R_RenderSegLoop two-sided seg branch upper/lower texture draws and the per-column ceilingclip/floorclip widening that preserves the open seg gap for sprites and back-sector planes.

modules.role: Implements R_MakeSpans column-over-column top/bottom diff walker, R_MapPlane per-span distance/xstep/ystep/length/angle/xfrac/yfrac derivation with the FixedMul light-diminish colormap pick, and the non-sky branch of R_DrawPlanes that flushes every visplane's column-major top/bottom intervals into horizontal spans through rDrawSpan.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 r_plane.c R_MakeSpans column-diff walker, R_MapPlane per-span distance/length/angle derivation, and R_DrawPlanes non-sky visplane span-flush behavior.

modules.role: Implements the visplane pool with R_ClearPlanes per-frame reset, R_FindPlane linear-scan (height,picnum,lightlevel)-triple lookup, R_CheckPlane width-or-split allocator, sky-collapse height=0/lightlevel=0 forcing, and the MAXVISPLANES=128 pool-overflow RangeError that mirrors vanilla's I_Error.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 r_plane.c R_ClearPlanes, R_FindPlane, and R_CheckPlane visplane allocation, merging, sky collapse, and pool-overflow behavior.

modules.role: Implements R_GenerateLookup/R_GenerateComposite/R_DrawColumnInCache wall-texture column fetch: single-patch direct columns store a (lumpNumber, offset) reference into the patch lump bytes, multi-patch composite columns allocate a texture.height-byte slot in a per-texture composite buffer with each patch memcpy-ed at originY+topDelta, and computeTextureWidthMask precomputes the power-of-two-or-zero width modulo for column index masking.
modules.vanilla_concept_modeled: Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 r_data.c R_GetColumn, R_GenerateLookup, R_GenerateComposite, and R_DrawColumnInCache wall-texture composite column fetch and width-mask behavior.

test_coverage.notes: test/render/ covers R_DrawColumn/R_DrawSpan inner loops with COLUMN_HEIGHT_MASK and FLAT_Y_SHIFT/FLAT_Y_MASK composition, R_DrawFuzzColumn fuzzpos counter wrap and FUZZ_OFFSETS table, R_RenderMaskedSegRange masked midtexture deferred draw with MAXSHORT done-flag, V_DrawPatch patch decode and post-chain blit, R_ExecuteSetViewSize centerx/centery/projection viewport derivation, MAXSEGS/MAXDRAWSEGS/MAXVISPLANES/MAXOPENINGS pool limits and CLIPRANGE sentinels, sky cylinder ANGLETOSKYSHIFT and F_SKY1 collapse, R_RenderSegLoop solid and two-sided wall column draws with ceilingclip/floorclip terminal writes, R_ProjectSprite six-step rejection cascade and MINZ/MAXVISSPRITES, R_SortVisSprites/R_DrawSprite drawseg silhouette walks, R_MakeSpans/R_MapPlane visplane span flush, R_FindPlane/R_CheckPlane allocation and merge with pool overflow, and R_GetColumn single-patch versus composite texture column fetch.

reference_manifest_status.notes: Manifest alignment records the vanilla SCREENWIDTH=320, SCREENHEIGHT=200 framebuffer dimensions, the MAXDRAWSEGS=256 drawseg cap, MAXVISPLANES=128 visplane pool cap, MAXVISSPRITES=128 vissprite pool cap, and MAXOPENINGS=20480 openings pool cap, plus the canonical Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 r_bsp.c/r_data.c/r_draw.c/r_main.c/r_plane.c/r_segs.c/r_sky.c/r_things.c renderer source files that the src/render/ modules model; this inventory does not embed WAD bytes or proprietary game data.

renderer_boundary_status.notes: src/render/ owns the software renderer surface partitioned into render_setup (projection.ts, renderLimits.ts) for viewport and pool/limit constants, render_primitives (drawPrimitives.ts, fuzz.ts) for the inner-loop column and span pixel writers, render_walls (solidWalls.ts, twoSidedWalls.ts, maskedTextures.ts) for one-sided and two-sided seg draws plus deferred masked midtextures, render_planes (visplanes.ts, visplaneSpans.ts, sky.ts) for floor/ceiling visplane allocation/merge and span flush plus sky-cylinder routing, render_sprites (spriteProjection.ts, spriteClip.ts) for per-mobj rejection/projection and back-to-front sort/drawseg-silhouette clip, and render_assets (wallColumns.ts, patchDraw.ts) for wall-texture composite column fetch and patch-format decode/draw. The renderer accepts ceilingclip/floorclip/visplane/drawseg/sprite-pool buffers and a Viewport through context records so each module can be unit-tested without a live BSP traversal or framebuffer surface.

implications: src/render/projection.ts is by far the broadest reuse footprint in the renderer lane (25 src/ importers and 22 test importers) — every other render module, every map/world/player module that touches viewport geometry, and every host launcher that derives the framebuffer surface depends on its FIELDOFVIEW/NUMCOLORMAPS/LIGHTLEVELS/MAX_SETBLOCKS/MIN_SETBLOCKS/SBARHEIGHT constants and the computeViewport derivation. Any reshape of the Viewport interface or the DetailMode const enum is a cross-lane breaking change that the launch, ui, automap, status-bar, and renderer lanes must absorb together.

src/render/renderLimits.ts pins the MAXDRAWSEGS=256, MAXVISPLANES=128, MAXVISSPRITES=128 (re-exported from spriteProjection.ts), and MAXOPENINGS=20480 vanilla pool caps plus the CLIPRANGE_SENTINEL_FIRST_LOW/LAST_LOW/LAST_HIGH solidsegs guard values and the VISPLANE_TOP_UNFILLED=0xff R_MakeSpans column-untouched marker; downstream renderer parity gates (Phase 09 and the framebuffer-hash oracle in 09-034 through 09-037) must keep these values pinned to the Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 defaults because vanilla I_Error overflow behavior is observable in demo and oracle captures.

Renderer modules accept ceiling/floor clip arrays, visplane and drawseg pools, sprite buffers, and a Viewport through injected context records (SolidWallRenderContext, TwoSidedWallRenderContext, MaskedSegRenderContext, SkyRenderContext, VisplaneSpanContext, SpriteProjectionContext, ClipVisSpriteContext, DrawMaskedContext, RenderPoolLimits) so the launch and gameplay lanes must wire those buffers and the per-frame R_ClearPlanes/R_ClearSprites resets at startup before R_RenderPlayerView fires; Phase 09 follow-ups (09-001 through 09-037) depend on this wiring. The fuzz-position counter (resetFuzzPos/setFuzzPos/getFuzzPos) is the only persistent renderer state that must survive across frames to match vanilla's fuzzpos global.

src/render/drawPrimitives.ts COLUMN_HEIGHT_MASK=127 and FLAT_Y_SHIFT=10/FLAT_Y_MASK=4032 wall and flat composition constants are bit-exact mirrors of vanilla r_draw.c R_DrawColumn/R_DrawSpan that the entire wall, sky, sprite, and visplane pipeline routes through; any deviation cascades through every framebuffer hash gate. The fuzz colormap index (FUZZ_COLORMAP_INDEX=6, FUZZ_COLORMAP_OFFSET=1536) and the 50-entry FUZZ_OFFSETS table are equally bit-exact and must match vanilla's fuzzoffset[FUZZTABLE] and the colormap-row-6 mid-brightness ramp.

src/render/sky.ts ANGLETOSKYSHIFT=22 and SKY_FLAT_NAME=F_SKY1 are the canonical sky-cylinder-wrap constants from vanilla r_sky.h that translate the 32-bit BAM viewangle into a 1024-virtual-column sky index; downstream parity tests must keep both values pinned to the Chocolate Doom 2.2.1 defaults until a sky-replacement subsystem permits override. Sky visplane collapse forces height=0 and lightlevel=0 in src/render/visplanes.ts findPlane and checkPlane so every sky-tagged plane merges into a single pool entry regardless of the source sector.

src/render/spriteProjection.ts MINZ=4*FRACUNIT=0x40000 near-clip cutoff, MAXVISSPRITES=128 pool cap, FF_FRAMEMASK=0x7fff sprite-frame mask, and FF_FULLBRIGHT=0x8000 fullbright bit are the vanilla r_things.c sprite invariants that govern monster, item, and projectile rendering; the renderer treats sprites as a per-frame pool reset by R_ClearSprites with R_ProjectSprite re-allocating each frame from R_AddSprites in the BSP traversal.
